text:
(4) The company shall provide extracts from such register to a member of the company on his request, within
seven days from the date on which such request is made upon the payment of such fee as may be specified in the
articles of the company but not exceeding ten rupees per page.
sentence_window:
(2) The entries in the register shall be made at once, whenever there is a cause to make entry, in chronological
order and shall be authenticated by the company secretary of the company or by any other person authorised by the
Board for the purpose. (3) The register shall be kept at the registered office of the company and the register shall be preserved
permanently and shall be kept in the custody of the company secretary of the company or any other person
authorised by the Board for the purpose. (4) The company shall provide extracts from such register to a member of the company on his request, within
seven days from the date on which such request is made upon the payment of such fee as may be specified in the
articles of the company but not exceeding ten rupees per page. 17. Payment to director for loss of office, etc.
